<!-- Describe the pain. Who feels it? When? How often? -->

<!-- What would the command look like? What does the output look like? -->

<!-- What else could solve this? Why is your proposal better? -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits within "a small, focused CLI for in-repo knowledge bases"
- [ ] This does NOT require a new runtime dependency (or the dependency is justified)
- [ ] This does NOT require users to run a separate service
